metadata.title: Relay
metadata.description: Collaborate in real time with live cursors. Create relays, add folders, and manage user access.

regex.source: description:"You are currently logged in as: "
description:"Please complete the login flow in your browser and wait a few seconds."
regex.target: description:"请在你的浏览器中完成登录流程，并等待几秒钟。"

regex.source:
description:`If your browser doesn't open, you can login manually by

regex.source: description:"Leave the relay. Local data is preserved."
description:"This will destroy the relay (deleting all data on the server). Local data is preserved."
regex.target: description:"这将销毁relay（删除服务器上的所有数据）。本地数据将保留。"

regex.source: description:"Share this key with your collaborators."
regex.target: description:"与您的协作者共享此密钥。"

regex.source: description:"Deletes the remote folder from the relay. Local files will be preserved."
regex.target: description:"从relay中删除远程文件夹。本地文件将被保留。"

regex.source: description:"Delete the local Shared Folder and all of its contents."
regex.target: description:"删除本地共享文件夹及其所有内容。"

regex.target: description:"删除编辑历史并禁用变更跟踪。"
